name: premature-contribution-firewall
description: A GitHub-oriented maintainer firewall that gates inbound PRs and issues by review readiness instead of AI detection.

src/mcp/core.mjs && node --check src/mcp/server.mjs && node --check scripts/mcp-smoke.mjs && node --check scripts/run-adversary.mjs && node --check scripts/run-benchmark.mjs && node --check scripts/run-maintainer-demo.mjs && node --check scripts/run-public-pilot.mjs && node --check scripts/run-large-bench.mjs && node --check scripts/run-watchlist.mjs && node --check
